name: OAuth2/OIDC Engine
description: Generic, config-driven OAuth2/OIDC protocol engine (authorize → token → userinfo, PKCE, refresh, private_key_jwt, Basic confidential-client auth) plus a custom/bring-your-own OIDC provider. Consumed by auth_sso (social catalog) and auth_acs (government catalog); the OIDC analogue of auth_saml.
author: Kuray Karaaslan
